## What's new:
- Updated YT version to `%yt_version%`
- YTLite: `%ytlite_version%`
## TIP:
Releases named **YTPlus** are releases with only YouPiP, YTUHD, YouQuality, RYD, YTABConfig and DontEatMyContent; releases named **YTPlusM** has those tweaks (YouPiP, YTUHD, YouQuality, RYD, YTABConfig and DontEatMyContent) but also the extra YTPlusM tweaks 
(YTweaks, Gonerino, YouSpeed, YTLowContrastMode, VolumeBoostYT, YouGetCaption).
